# Maintenance Report

## Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task needed.

## Scope
Explain the scope of the maintenance work (which files, components, or systems are affected).

## Proposed Changes
Describe the specific changes that need to be made for this maintenance task.

## Impact
Explain the impact of this maintenance work (e.g., performance improvements, reduced technical debt, better code readability).

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the maintenance task here.
